title: elaeocarpus rosselensis
intro: Elaeocarpus rosselensis, also known as the Rossel silk fig, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, with its leaves and roots used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus rosselensis include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect the body from damage caused by free radicals. Elaeocarpus rosselensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine in the Pacific region.
